addItems.title: Add items
addItems.hintQuantityDefault: Quantity defaults to 1. Use -1 for uncountable items.

addItems.hintLocationMatch: Locations match by numeric ID or name (case-insensitive).
addItems.hintCurrentLocationFallback: On a location page, a single word adds to the current location.
